rationale: Documentation build maps accepted GC requirements to owning KB files. System docs now define archive commit before tracked GC, separate GC commit, restore ledger commands, agent-owned GC review, API-owned safe GC path, validation report purge boundaries, and graph next-action expectations. Alignment audit passed; changed audit only warns that generated graph state changed from rebuild/build refresh and must be handled before publication. Policy blocks documentation validation until audit:stale-reference are recorded.
